vulnerability.reference: Reliance on aggregate performance metrics without behavioral unit tests enables undetected functional incoherence.
vulnerability.generated: Engineers lack mechanisms to verify that weight-matched models preserve functionally coherent representations before production deployment.

impact.reference: Undetected model incoherence leads to erroneous downstream outputs, eroding user trust and causing operational harm.
impact.generated: Deployed language models exhibit functionally incoherent outputs, causing incorrect decisions and loss of user trust.

dose_response.reference: Misaligned weight permutations in model merging produce incoherent models; when deployed by ML engineers without behavioral testing, undetected errors emerge, eroding user trust and causing operational harm.
dose_response.generated: Misaligned weight permutations in model merging, through ML engineers deploying merged language models, triggers lack of verification for coherent representations, leading to functionally incoherent outputs and user trust loss.
